task_completion.description: FreeCAD is open and the Part Design workbench is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is visible, and the workbench selector dropdown (usually at the top) displays 'Part Design'.

task_completion.description: The base circular disc of the flange is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A solid 3D circular disc is visible in the 3D viewport, and a 'Pad' feature appears in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: The center pilot hole is created in the flange.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large circular hole is visible in the center of the 3D disc, and a 'Pocket' feature appears in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Four bolt holes are created using a polar pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four smaller holes are visible in the 3D model, evenly spaced around the center hole, and a 'PolarPattern' feature appears in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar or the active document tab displays 'nema23_motor_flange' or 'nema23_motor_flange.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical interface to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking on FreeCAD toolbars, using the Model tree, or interacting with the 3D viewport, rather than just running a script in the Python console or terminal.

integrity.description: The result is a genuine 3D model in FreeCAD.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport displays a shaded 3D object with depth, and the Model tree shows a valid feature history (Pad, Pocket, PolarPattern) rather than an imported 2D image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected model is a NEMA 23 stepper motor mounting flange. It must be a circular disc (60mm diameter, 5mm thickness) with a 38.1mm center pilot hole and four 5.5mm bolt holes. The FreeCAD Model tree must show 'Pad', 'Pocket', and 'PolarPattern' features, confirming the correct Part Design workflow was used. The file must be saved as 'nema23_motor_flange.FCStd'.
